creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 

This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my  Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress!

💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you!

Located in downtown St. Petersburg’s arts district, this museum houses one of the largest and most comprehensive collections of Salvador Dalí’s masterpieces outside of Europe — from his iconic melting clocks to mind-bending visual illusions that challenge reality itself.

📍 Address:
1 Dali Blvd, Saint Petersburg, FL 33701 

🕐 Hours:
Open daily 10 AM – 6 PM, with extended hours until 8 PM on Thursdays 

🎟️ Ticket Info (timed entry recommended):
• Adults (18–64): ~$29–$32
• Seniors/Students: ~$20–$29
• Youth (6–12): ~$12
• Kids 5 & under: Free
• Thursday evenings after 5 PM: reduced rates

(special exhibits like 360° Dome or VR experiences may be additional)

#stpete #dalimuseum #thingstodoinflorida #museums #floridaculture
